overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077) during a heavy rainstorm. The camera exits a modern building lobby and walks through busy downtown streets with neon signs, holographic advertisements, and futuristic vehicles, ending in a covered plaza with reflective water pools.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern building lobby transitioning to covered entrance

events.description: exiting building interior through glass doors to outdoor covered walkway
transitioning from artificial indoor lighting to natural overcast rainy light

agents.ego_description: walking out of a modern building lobby past kneeling figures toward the rainy street

notable_agents.action: figure in orange robe kneeling near the glass wall

entered.detail: large glass windows with circuit-like patterns and reflections
standing digital display screen near entrance
illuminated signage on distant futuristic building

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a modern building lobby with glass walls and circuit-like patterns. The camera moves past kneeling figures toward the exit, transitioning from indoor artificial lighting to the natural light of a rainy morning. Outside, the wet asphalt reflects the city lights, and the Night City sign is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with pedestrian seating and palm trees

events.description: turning right to follow the sidewalk along the main street
futuristic black vehicle passes by on the wet road

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past modern benches and palm trees

notable_agents.action: sleek black futuristic car driving past on the rain-soaked street

entered.detail: modern concrete benches with people sitting
tall palm trees lining the street
large holographic advertisement displaying a figure

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked downtown street lined with palm trees and modern benches. The Night City sign remains visible on the left while futuristic vehicles pass on the right. The camera moves past pedestrians and approaches a large holographic billboard in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with neon signage and crosswalks

events.description: entering busier pedestrian area with increased crowd density and neon lighting
crossing the street among crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense crowds of pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and neon clothing while crossing the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing green umbrella walking past camera
person with bright green hair and purple jacket crossing the street

entered.detail: bright neon signs and advertisements on building facades
yellow and black bollards separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
ground with distinctive yellow geometric markings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a busy downtown intersection filled with pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas. The camera crosses the street among the crowd, passing yellow traffic barriers and neon signs. The holographic billboard and palm trees shift to the left as the camera moves forward toward a plaza with distinctive yellow patterned pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with reflective water pools and geometric architecture

events.description: entering covered walkway with reflective water features and concrete columns
moving deeper into enclosed area with tall geometric pillars and water reflections

agents.ego_description: walking into a sheltered plaza area with water features, passing fewer pedestrians

entered.detail: shallow pools of water reflecting the surrounding architecture and rain
tall rectangular concrete pillars arranged in grid pattern
overhead glass and concrete shelter blocking the rain

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a covered plaza sheltered from the rain, featuring distinctive yellow patterned pavement and geometric concrete columns. The camera walks past reflective water pools that mirror the surrounding futuristic architecture. The space is quieter with fewer pedestrians, transitioning from the busy street to this contemplative architectural space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile interior of a modern lobby into the rain-drenched chaos of a cyberpunk downtown, eventually settling in a quiet, sheltered plaza. It begins inside a building with glass walls and circuit patterns, moving past kneeling figures as the lighting shifts from artificial indoor glow to the gray, natural light of a rainy morning. As the camera exits onto the wet asphalt, it glides past palm trees and futuristic vehicles with the Night City sign looming in the distance before approaching a massive holographic billboard. The scene then opens into a crowded intersection where the camera weaves through pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and yellow traffic barriers, shifting the neon signs and palms to the periphery. Finally, the movement leads into a covered plaza with yellow patterned pavement and geometric columns, passing reflective water pools that mirror the surrounding architecture in a sudden transition to a quieter, contemplative space.
